description_long: This coffee machine features a compact, rectangular body with a predominantly light beige or cream-colored exterior, accented by black trim and a glossy black top surface. The front face appears to have a recessed area, likely for placing a cup, and a small control interface is visible on the top front edge. The machine sits on a flat, wood-textured surface, suggesting it is designed for countertop use. The sides are smooth and unadorned, while the back is plain and functional. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, and the overall design is minimalist and utilitarian.
description: A compact, rectangular coffee machine with a beige body, black accents, and a glossy black top, featuring a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the glossy black top surface and the recessed area at the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth beige side panel and the black base trim.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the recessed cup area and the control interface on the top front edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the plain beige side and black trim.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small control panel with buttons is located on the top front edge of the machine.
